What's included

10 worksheets and planners covering every room and routine in your small apartment.

  • 📅

    7-Day Small Space Reset Plan

    A day-by-day plan that walks you through your whole apartment in one week.

  • 🍳

    Small Kitchen Reset Checklist

    Step-by-step reset for a calmer, more functional small kitchen.

  • 🪥

    Bathroom Storage Planner

    Map out exactly what storage you need for your specific bathroom.

  • 👗

    Tiny Closet Reset Worksheet

    Edit, categorize, and organize your closet in one focused session.

  • 🚪

    Entryway Drop Zone Planner

    Create a landing system so your entryway stops collecting clutter.

  • 🪣

    Under-Sink Organization Sheet

    Map out what goes under each sink — kitchen and bathroom.

  • 🏠

    Renter-Safe Shopping List

    Every product recommended in the kit, with renter-friendly notes.

  • 📏

    Measurement Tracker

    Write down key measurements before you shop — avoid buying the wrong size.

  • ✅

    Weekly Reset Checklist

    A simple 20-minute weekly routine to maintain what you've organized.

  • 📦

    Amazon Finds Tracker

    A blank tracker to add your own product links and notes as you shop.

This kit is for you if…

  • You rent and can't drill or make permanent changes.
  • Your bathroom, kitchen, or closet always feels cluttered.
  • You want a calmer home without buying expensive custom systems.
  • You need a simple plan, not another overwhelming organizing project.
  • You want to know what to measure and what to buy before spending money.

Why it works

Most organization advice gives you inspiration — a product list and a vague idea. What it doesn't give you is a process. Without a process, you buy the products, arrange things for a few days, and then everything goes back to the way it was.

🎯

One room at a time

Each worksheet covers one specific space so you're not overwhelmed by the whole apartment.

📐

Measure before you buy

The measurement tracker and shopping list mean you only buy what will actually fit and work.

🔄

Built to stay organized

The weekly reset routine takes 20 minutes and keeps your systems from sliding back into chaos.

🏠

Renter-first approach

Every recommendation is no-drill, no-damage, and safe for any lease — no custom shelving required.

10 printable worksheets delivered instantly as a PDF.

Questions about the Reset Kit

Is this a physical product?

No — this is a digital product delivered to your email after purchase. You'll receive a PDF download link immediately. No shipping, no waiting.

Can I use it if I rent?

Yes. The entire kit is designed for renters — every recommendation is no-drill and lease-friendly.

Do I need tools or supplies?

No tools required. You'll need a tape measure for the measurement tracker and a printer if you want to print the pages — though they work just as well digitally.

Is this beginner-friendly?

Yes. The kit was designed for people who feel overwhelmed by organizing, not for people who already have it figured out. Every worksheet is clear and simple.

How do I get the files?

After purchase, you'll receive an email with a download link. You'll also be able to download directly from the confirmation page.

Can I print it?

Absolutely. The worksheets are designed to be printed on standard letter-size paper, but they also work great on any tablet or screen.

Ready to reset your space?

Start with the room that's been bothering you most. The kit walks you through the rest.
